groups.title: Safety & Trade Mode
groups.subtitle: Hard-defaults to DEMO. LIVE must be explicit.

fields.label: Strategy Mode
fields.hint: flip = SuperTrend flip/trend (default); confluence = legacy 11-signal

fields.label: Dry Run
fields.hint: Log trades without calling the API

fields.label: Allowed Pairs
fields.hint: curated OTC allowlist, comma-separated (authoritative; BLOCKED_PAIRS ignored when set)

fields.label: FlipStreamer
fields.hint: event-driven bar-close entries (~1s lag vs ~6s poll); restart required

fields.label: Streaming Pairs
fields.hint: comma-separated; ≤4 (WS subscription cap); excluded from poll scan

fields.label: One Trade / Pair
fields.hint: block re-entry until the active trade resolves (~5s)

fields.label: Flip Window (bars)
fields.hint: flip treated as 'fresh' if trend started ≤N bars ago

fields.label: Candle Fetch Concurrency
fields.hint: parallel history() fetches per cycle (cap avoids WS hang)

groups.title: SuperTrend Entry Params
groups.subtitle: .env defaults · tune live via data/flip_levers.json (no restart)

fields.label: SuperTrend Period
fields.hint: edit data/flip_levers.json to retune live without restart

fields.label: SuperTrend Multiplier
fields.hint: edit data/flip_levers.json to retune live without restart

fields.label: ADX Min – flip
fields.hint: ADX floor for fresh SuperTrend flips

fields.label: ADX Min – trend
fields.hint: ADX floor for trend continuation entries

fields.label: ADX Max (exhaustion cap)
fields.hint: skip if ADX above this; 999=disabled; data: ADX 45+ → ~17% WR

fields.label: Require ADX Rising
fields.hint: trend continuation: ADX must be increasing

fields.label: ATR Distance Min
fields.hint: price ≥ N × ATR from SuperTrend band (trend entries)

fields.label: MACD Gap Min (ATR-norm)
fields.hint: |MACD−signal|/ATR floor; 0=off; gates both flips and continuations

groups.title: Entry Gates
groups.subtitle: Payout floor · EV gate · cold-start bypass

fields.label: Min Payout %
fields.hint: skip pair if PO payout below this (0=disabled)

fields.label: Min Expected Value
fields.hint: EV = win_rate×(payout/100+1)−1; 0=break-even, −0.05=warmup tolerance

fields.label: Min EV Samples
fields.hint: tracked trades per (pair, direction, expiry) before EV gate activates

fields.label: SSID
fields.hint: full 42["auth",{…}] frame

fields.label: Detected Mode
fields.hint: from is_demo()
